title: Saudi-Style Stew
description: A hearty, comforting stew inspired by the flavors of Saudi Arabia. This stew is made with tender meat and a blend of aromatic spices.

ingredients.name: saudia spices blend (or ground cumin, coriander, cinnamon)

instructions: Heat the ghee in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the onion and cook until it starts to brown, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for another minute.
Add the stew meat and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the tomato paste, water, and spices blend. Stir well to combine.
Bring the stew to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 1 1/2 hours, or until the meat is tender.
Serve the stew hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley or cilantro, if desired.
